name: Table
description: A flexible table component with support for borders, hover effects, compact mode, and overflow handling.
usage_guidelines: Enable hoverable for row hover effects.
Use compact for dense data tables.
Enable bordered for clear cell separation.
Set overflow for horizontal scrolling on small screens.
Compose with THead, TBody, Tr, Th, Td components.

compact.description: Reduces cell padding for dense tables.

styling_info.visual_description: A standard HTML table with optional borders, hover effects, and responsive overflow. Supports vertical dividers and compact spacing.

Do: Use hoverable for better row scanning
Dont: Don't overload with too many columns

ColumnVerticalLine.title: Column Vertical Line
ColumnVerticalLine.code:
import Table from '@/components/ui/Table' const { Tr, Th, Td, THead, TBody } = Table const ColumnVerticalLine = () => { return (
Company Contact Country
Alfreds Futterkiste Maria Anders Germany
Centro comercial Moctezuma Francisco Chang Mexico
Ernst Handel Roland Mendel Austria
) } export default ColumnVerticalLine
